title: Example Vulnerability Challenge
description: Fix the vulnerable code to prevent exploitation.
hint: Consider using parameterized queries instead of string concatenation.

attack_flow.label: Query Built
attack_flow.value: SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = \' OR \'1\'=\'1

canonical_fix: Use parameterized queries: cursor.execute('SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = ?', (username,))
explanation: Parameterized queries separate SQL logic from data, preventing injection.
why_blocked: The parameterized query treats the input as a literal string value, not SQL syntax.
